zh.lifeSummary: 當Walram van Limburg III於1165年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 提爾利包格 (拉)時，他的父親Hendrik III van Limburg26歲，母親Sophie von Saarbrücken21歲。他於1214年與Ermesende de Luxembourg I在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年7月2日在荷蘭利包格可可拉德享年61歲，埋葬在荷蘭利包格可可拉德洛勒度可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walram van Limburg III于1165年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇庫爾斯騰圖姆 提爾利包格 (拉)时，他的父亲Hendrik III van Limburg26岁，母亲Sophie von Saarbrücken21岁。他于1214年与Ermesende de Luxembourg I在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1226年7月2日在荷兰利包格可可拉德享年61岁，埋葬在荷兰利包格可可拉德洛勒度可。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Walram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: from a personal name denoting the older brother of the god Krishna, an avatar of the god Vishnu. It means ‘Ram the strong one’, referring to his legendary muscular strength and penchant for using farm equipment (notably the plow) as weaponry. This surname is found mainly in Guyana, and also in South Africa and Trinidad and Tobago. It is apparently not used in India.

en.lifeSummary: When Walram van Limburg III was born in 1165, in Limburg (Lahn), Kurfürstentum Trier, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Hendrik III van Limburg, was 26 and his mother, Sophie von Saarbrücken, was 21. He married Ermesende de Luxembourg I in 1214, in Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 July 1226, in Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 61, and was buried in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walram van Limburg III est né en 1165, à Limburg (Lahn), Kurfürstentum Trier, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Hendrik III van Limburg, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Saarbrücken, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ermesende de Luxembourg I en 1214, à Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1226, à Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas.

historicEvents.description: 1214 erhielt der Ort das Stadtrecht vom staufischen König Friedrich II.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walram van Limburg III 1165 in Limburg (Lahn), Kurfürstentum Trier, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik III van Limburg 26 und seine Mutter Sophie von Saarbrücken 21. Er hat 1214 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Ermesende de Luxembourg I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1226 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande und wurde in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Walram van Limburg IIIが1165年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチクルフuルステントゥム トリールリンブルグ (ラン)で生まれた時，父Hendrik III van Limburgは26歳，母Sophie von Saarbrückenは21歳であった。1214年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでErmesende de Luxembourg Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年7月2日にオランダリンブルグケルクラドで61歳で死去し，オランダリンブルグケルクラドロルドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 트리어 림버그 (라)
ko.lifeSummary: Walram van Limburg III(이)가 1165년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 트리어 림버그 (라)에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik III van Limburg(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie von Saarbrücken(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1214년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Ermesende de Luxembourg I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 7월 2일 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드 롤드크에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Ermesende de Luxembourg I em 1214, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Limburg, Duché de Limburg, Holy Roman Em: лимбург (лахн), курфuрстентум триир, хилигесь рoмищесь раич
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walram van Limburg III родился в 1165 г. в местности лимбург (лахн), курфuрстентум триир, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Hendrik III van Limburg было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Saarbrücken, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermesende de Luxembourg I в 1214 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 июля 1226 г. в местности киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности ролдук, киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды.

Se casó con Ermesende de Luxembourg I en 1214, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
